title: Private Preview — RutherfordMade.com v4 | For Scott's Review
h1s: Scott — your new lead system is live.
bodyTextSample:
PRIVATE PREVIEW · FOR SCOTT
BUILD V4 · APRIL 18, 2026
A PRIVATE PREVIEW FOR RUTHERFORDMADE
Scott — your new lead system is live.

BWM's AI system rebuilt your site on top of our intelligent lead-generation platform. Same voice your customers recognize, same projects you've delivered — underneath, it's a different animal, working for you every hour of every day. Below: what changed, the before-and-after, what's running under the hood, and the four things we need from you before it replaces ruther
